texto: How beautiful the tragic seems when it is beneath a mask, but when it appears so nakedly before me and... when I am so forcibly implicated... I don't know whether I care for it so much. Somehow or other it is as though I were torturing myself.("Thirty-Three Abominations")
explicacao: Citação de Lydia Zinovieva-Annibal sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “How beautiful the tragic seems when it is beneath a mask, but when it appears so nakedly before m…” articula autoestima, mask, masks em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como masks e tragedy.

frase_original: How beautiful the tragic seems when it is beneath a mask, but when it appears so nakedly before me and... when I am so forcibly implicated... I don't know whether I care for it so much. Somehow or other it is as though I were torturing myself.("Thirty-Three Abominations")

texto: I often think about this, that is, I imagine to myself that here is Vera, dead, totally motionless, lying on the table, in a coffin... and I too, of course can no longer live. But for some reason this gives me pleasure, a terrible amount of pleasure to imagine so the one I love: earlier I imagined grandmother and then my fiance in this manner, even my favorite animals, Sparky our cat with the fiery bursts of red on his gray-black fur.("Thirty-Three Abominations")
explicacao: Citação de Lydia Zinovieva-Annibal sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I often think about this, that is, I imagine to myself that here is Vera, dead, totally motionles…” articula reflexao, dead, death em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e death.
